name: Interworks, Inc.
summary: Interworks, Inc. plans, develops, and manages human resources business industry recruitment sites in Japan. It also provides Internet advertising agency services for human resources business industry; and plans, develops, and manages other Websites. In addition, the company engages in the planning, development, and sale of human resources business industry staff management systems; and sale of skill check diagnostic tools. Further, it offers support services for career change in IT, manufacturing, and financial industries. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
